title: centaurea phalacrica
intro: Centaurea phalacrica, also known as mountain cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in soothing digestive issues and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant's extracts are said to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea phalacrica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant require further scientific research.
